name: Special Potato Frittata
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter with oil in a skillet over medium heat.
2. Mix potatoes and flour.
3. Add potato mixture, paprika, garlic powder, and Italian seasoning to the skillet and cook until potatoes are just tender, stirring often for about 10 minutes.
4. Combine eggs with parmesan cheese in a medium bowl. Season with salt and pepper.
5. Pour egg mixture over potatoes.
6. Pierce holes in the egg mixture and lift edges with a spatula, tipping the pan to allow uncooked egg to flow under, until edges set, about one minute.
7. Reduce heat to low, cover skillet, and continue cooking until eggs are set.
